L142.title: Lake Declarer Behavioral Consistency
L142.hook: Assassin is 100% consistent (best cover); Morgana slips most (81%)

L143.title: Assassin Target Seat Preference
L143.hook: Top-leader targets get hit 49%; quiet seats only 39%

overview.seatPositionSub: Overall win rate per seat with role distribution

lake.loading: Loading Lady of the Lake analysis…

mission.failBallSub: Number of fail cards (black balls) revealed per mission
mission.missionVsOutcomeSub: Outcome breakdown after each mission pass/fail (Mission 5 omitted, always 100%)

rounds.firstVoteSub: 1-1 = Mission 1's first vote. How team composition affects later rounds.
rounds.redCountTitle: Red Players in Vote 1 × Outcome Breakdown
rounds.redCountSub: Number of red roles on Mission 1 first-vote team
rounds.stateSub: State = mission result sequence (R=fail, B=pass). 3-Red + 3-BlueDead + 3-BlueAlive = 100%, only states with 20+ games and not all-red/all-blue.

captain.headerSub: Parsed from text records, captain seat per mission mapped via seat→role config. {{count}}+ games analyzed.
captain.perMissionSub: Share of red vs blue captains for each mission. Red share drops in later missions as Blue starts excluding red after failures.
captain.factionVsResultSub: Mission pass rate when red captain leads vs blue captain. Red captains intentionally fail missions, so their pass rate is far lower.
captain.winRateSub: Final outcome breakdown when red/blue captain leads a passed/failed mission.

seat.guide1: Avalon seat order affects info flow and vote order. Seat numbers are fixed positions (1-10).
seat.guide2: Different seats have different strategic value: seats near the captain are picked more often, speaking order affects information weight.
seat.guide3Overall: Value = player's overall win rate (%) at that seat. Color = deviation from seat average across all players. Green = above seat avg, red = below.
seat.guide3Red: Value = player's red-side win rate (%) at that seat. Color = deviation from seat average across all players. Green = above seat avg, red = below.
seat.guide3Blue: Value = player's blue-side win rate (%) at that seat. Color = deviation from seat average across all players. Green = above seat avg, red = below.
seat.footnoteOverall: Players with 30+ games — values are overall win rate (%)
seat.footnoteRed: Players with 30+ games — values are red-side win rate (%)
seat.footnoteBlue: Players with 30+ games — values are blue-side win rate (%)

seatOrder.title: Percival/Merlin/Morgana Seat Order
seatOrder.sub: Six clockwise orderings of Percival/Merlin/Morgana and their effect on win rate. {{games}} valid games analyzed, overall red win rate {{rate}}%.
seatOrder.outcomeTitle: Outcome Distribution (3-Red | 3-Blue Merlin Killed | 3-Blue Merlin Alive)
seatOrder.interleaveSub: Interleave = other players seated between the trio (non-adjacent).
seatOrder.concl1: Mei-Na-Pai (M-Mor-P) has lowest red rate (~41%) — Merlin and Morgana sit adjacent, Percival can tell them apart more easily.
seatOrder.concl2: Mei-Pai-Na (M-P-Mor) has highest red rate (~48%) — Percival sandwiched between them, info-passing efficiency drops.
seatOrder.concl3: Compare interleaved vs adjacent red win — interleaving means other players sit between the trio, possibly disrupting info flow.

descriptions.coWin: Rate at which both players win together
descriptions.coLose: Rate at which both players lose together

chemistry.guideCoWin: Value = % of games where both players are on the winning side. Higher = they win together more often.
chemistry.guideCoLose: Value = % of games where both players are on the losing side. Higher = they lose together more often.
chemistry.guideWinCorr1: Value = win-rate correlation coefficient. Positive (green) = when one wins the other tends to win; negative (red) = the opposite.
chemistry.guideCoWinMinusLose1: Value = co-win count minus co-lose count. Positive (green) = good chemistry, win together more than lose; negative (red) = the reverse.

guest.renameOrBindHint: Bind an account first (Google / Discord / Line) so your data survives a rename
guest.renameReservedPrefix: Name cannot start with "Guest_" (reserved for system defaults)
guest.renameFailed: Rename failed, please try again later
